ORDER RE: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL TAKESHA HOLMES'S DEPOSITION

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL TAKESHA HOLMES TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. TAKESHA HOLMES TO APPEAR FOR HER DEPOSITION ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 14, 2015 AT A DATE, TIME AND LOCATION SELECTED BY PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. NOTICE OF DEPOSITION TO BE PURSUANT TO THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. TAKESHA HOLMES TO PAY PETITIONER $3,219.76 NO LATER THAN 5:00 P.M. AUGUST 14, 2015. CHECK TO BE MADE PAYABLE TO SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AND CHOLAKIAN & ASSOCIATES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Leshauna Jacksons To Appear At Deposition And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara Igdari, Esq., 925.389.0788, for Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority; no other appearances.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion To Compel Leshauna Jacksons To Appear At Deposition And Request For Sanctions is unopposed and is granted. Le'Shauna Jackson to appear for her deposition on or before August 14, 2015 at a date, time and location selected by Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority. Notice of deposition to be pursuant to the Code of Civil Procedure. Petitioner's request for sanctions is granted. Le'Shauna Jackson to pay Petitioner $3,219.76 no later than 5:00 p.m. August 14, 2015. Check to be made payable to San Francisco Housing Authority and Cholakian & Associates. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Takesha Holmes To Appear At Deposition And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara Igdari, Esq., 925.389.0788, for Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority; no other appearances.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion To Compel Takesha Holmes To Appear At Deposition And Request For Sanctions is granted. Takesha Holmes to appear for her deposition on or before August 14, 2015 at a date, time and location selected by Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority. Notice of deposition to be pursuant to the Code of Civil Procedure. Petitioner's request for sanctions is granted. Takesha Holmes to pay Petitioner $3,219.76 no later than 5:00 p.m. August 14, 2015. Check to be made payable to San Francisco Housing Authority and Cholakian & Associates. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority'S Hearing Of Verified Petition For An Order To Perpetuate Testimony
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian J. Finn, Esq., 650.871.9544, for petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority.
Joshua H. Watson, Esq., 415.421.2800, for other parties Keith William and Wanda Foster.

Matter argued and the court took Petitioner San Francisco Housing Authority's Verified Petition For An Order To Perpetuate Testimony under submission. Judge Pro Tem Robert F. Kane, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported (302).

Notice Of Hearing Of Verified Petition Of Sfha For An Order To Perpetuate Testimony
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Continued To Oct-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Verified Petition For An Order To Perpetuate Testimony. The motion, which is made pursuant to sections of the California Discovery Act, is continued to October 30, 2014, to be heard on the discovery calendar. The matter will be heard at 9:00 a.m. in room 301 on October 30, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
